name: Skyview Drive-In
description: One of America's longest-running drive-in theaters, Skyview has been entertaining families since 1949. Features double-feature programming and a classic concession stand with traditional drive-in fare.

name: Starlite Drive-In
description: A classic drive-in experience in the heart of Ohio, Starlite offers double features on weekends and features a nostalgic concession stand with popcorn, candy, and hot dogs.

name: Moonlite Drive-In
description: Tennessee's premier drive-in theater featuring the latest releases with classic FM broadcast audio. Moonlite offers a full menu of concessions and a family-friendly atmosphere.

name: Sunset Drive-In
description: A family favorite since 1952, Sunset Drive-In offers the classic drive-in experience with modern touches. Two screens show current releases throughout the summer season.

name: Bel Air Drive-In
description: Michigan's largest drive-in with four screens showing a mix of current releases and classic films. Bel Air features a spacious concession stand and beautiful grounds.

name: Vineland Drive-In
description: Southern California's classic drive-in theater with a nostalgic charm and modern amenities. Vineland features double features and a full-service snack bar.

name: Twin Drive-In
description: One of the last operating drive-ins in the Texas Panhandle, Twin offers a unique experience with two screens and classic Texas hospitality.

name: Holiday Drive-In
description: An upstate New York institution, Holiday Drive-In serves the northern region with summer blockbusters and classic films. Spacious grounds and family-friendly atmosphere.

name: Sands Drive-In
description: Florida's sunny drive-in experience with year-round programming. Sands features comfortable seating, a full concession menu, and a beautiful outdoor setting.

name: Elk Valley Drive-In
description: Colorado's drive-in gem nestled near the Front Range. Elk Valley offers summer releases with stunning mountain views and a full-service concession stand.
